CONTENT.Club career: Nevistić joined Rijeka's youth team in June 2015. He signed his first professional contract with the club in June 2016. He spent most of his early professional years on loan at Varaždin. In July 2018, Nevistić signed a new 4-year contract with Rijeka. In 2020–21 Europa League, Nevistić accumulated more saves than any other goalkeeper in the group stage (19), as Rijeka finished last in their group.
CONTENT.External links: Ivan Nevistić at Soccerway.comIvan Nevistić at WorldFootball.netIvan Nevistić at FBref.comIvan Nevistić at the Croatian Football FederationIvan Nevistić at Croatian Football Statistics  (archived) (in Croatian)
CONTENT.International career: He has been capped for various Croatian youth national teams.

SUMMARY: Ivan Nevistić (born 31 July 1998) is a Croatian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for GNK Dinamo Zagreb, in the Croatian Football League.
